item.description:
# Shruti 1.1.9
Follow-Me, made instant — plus important stability fixes.
- **Follow-Me now reacts the moment you click.** It used to wait up to a second before muting the other apps; now it responds to the app switch itself, so the focus moves as fast as you do. - **Switching is smooth and silent.** Shruti no longer tears down and rebuilds audio taps every time you change apps, so there is no lag or pop when the focus moves — just a clean, instant cross-fade. - **It follows what you're hearing, and stays there.** When you click a playing app it becomes the focus; when you click a non-playing app (an editor, Finder) Shruti keeps the thing you were listening to instead of letting everything blast back. - **Recognizes every app.** Arc, Apple TV, and any other app that is actually making sound are now managed by Follow-Me, not just a fixed list — so nothing keeps playing when it should be muted. - **Stability:** fixed two rare conditions that could interrupt audio — one when an app's audio device changed while playing, and one when adjusting an app's EQ or effects live. Both are now handled safely. - **Magic Boost** now guarantees it can never push loud moments into distortion.
